name: VisionWave Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview VisionWave Holdings, Inc. (the Company, VisionWave, we, us, or our) is a Delaware corporation formed on March 20, 2024, with principal executive offices located at 300 Delaware Avenue, Suite 210 #301, Wilmington, Delaware 19801. Our common stock trades on The Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol VWAV, and our publicly traded warrants trade under the symbol VWAVW.
